creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
cyrus-sasl 2.1.26 has been released that uses size_t instead of unsigned
long in callback functions.  An update to sendmail has been created in
the 9.1Stable base.

Could the change documented at
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/svn-src-stable-9/2012-December/003370.html
be included in a /usr/ports/mail/sendmail/files/patch-cyrus_2.1.6 until a
sendmail update?

Fix: 

Patch at http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/svn-src-stable-9/2012-December/003370.html
